expected_behavior: Produces exactly 4 output files: factcheck-report.md, correction-manifest.md, skill-feedback.md, FACTCHECK_GATE.md
FACTCHECK_GATE.md contains SCORE, CONFIDENCE, ACTION, BLOCKING_COUNT, WARNING_COUNT fields
Score is calculated with explicit formula shown (N passed / M total checked) × 10 — never estimated
ACTION is one of: PROCEED, WARN, or BLOCKED
Dims 1-3 are run (consistency, math, reference data)
Dims 4-20 are NOT run in quick tier (noted as UNVERIFIED, not FAILED)
Score is 10/10 if no failures found in dims 1-3 — not penalized for unverified dims
Correction manifest lists the score error with correct value
FACTCHECK_GATE.md ACTION = WARN or BLOCKED (not PROCEED) when math error detected
Factcheck report shows the formula mismatch explicitly
Skill detects missing workspace with clear error message
Does NOT create partial factcheck output files
Does NOT write FACTCHECK_GATE.md with fabricated scores
Suggests running the full audit pipeline first
